channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 23rd April
item.description:
CW pothole 1000mm x 500mm x 43mm Stop and go TM Outside number 165 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 23rd April
item.description:

item.title: Tree over hanging garden almost touching house, 23rd April
item.description:
Tree next to bus shelter by 1B Devon Avenue Cheltenham GL51 8AT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1b, Devon Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Base of trees overgrown, 23rd April
item.description:
The grids at the bases of these trees along The Broadwalk were removed supposedly to make maintenance easier, however, they are not maintained and badly require weeding and tidying up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Imperial Square, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple black bin bags, 23rd April
item.description:
Multiple black bin bags have been dumped down the northeast and southeast embankment on National Highways land at the end of the parapets belonging to Hardwicke-Elmstone Hard Bridge (which carries an unnamed road over the M5). The bin bags are beginning to split with litter being spread into the woodland.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsatisfactory and incomplete repairs to pot holes, 23rd April
item.description:
The location is directly outside the Greyhound Pub within Greyhound Gardens. Some incomplete repairs were carried out the week but they are very poorly done. It has gone from a lunar landscape to a Land Rover Test Track. It is hard to understand how resources can be wasted in this way. It would have been much better to repair this road surface covering a complete section rather than having an extremely poor patch repair that will have to be done again. Does anyone supervise the quality of this work? Drive over the “repaired” section and you will understand what I mean. The poor standard of pot hole repairs in Longlevens is unacceptable and a talking point. Please investigate and initiate a satisfactory repair program.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwater Way, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 23rd April
item.description:
Cut back Hedge to boundary 24mtrs Give and take TM with Footway closure Outside number 19 (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bay obstruction, 23rd April
item.description:
Dear Sir/Madam, I hope you’re well. I’m writing to raise a concern regarding the yellow line road markings outside my property. The lines currently extend across the entrance to my driveway, which is quite narrow, and this is making it difficult to safely enter and exit the property. Due to the positioning of the markings, there is limited space to manoeuvre, and it can feel unsafe when pulling in or out, particularly with passing traffic. We can only reverse out onto the main road as cars the left hang over the exit/ entrance to the drive way. I would be grateful if someone could review this and advise whether any adjustments can be made to improve access and safety. The post you see on the image is in line with the width of the drive way but with the parking lines and yellow lines it makes it near impossible to get off the drive way safely. Thank you for your time and assistance. Kind regards, Chris Whaley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Andover Road, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stream blocked by branches in two places can be seen from bridge the one nearest bibry road., 23rd April
item.description:
Walking my dog few people noticed branches across the stream in two places according to one lady it was done about 6 o'clock last night by 6 or 7 youths 14,15 years old.She was Afraid to say anything to them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 204, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal bollard uprooted due to collision., 23rd April
item.description:
Corner of Silk Mill Lane and Castle Street. Been in this condition for weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silk Mill Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Roadsigns attached to lamppost inappropriately, 23rd April
item.description:
There are three road signs attached to a lamp post that may have been moved there during gas works but which make no sense in their location and need removing or locating correctly to avoid confusing road users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 243,245, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: The owner of 33 Sandford Street has repaired pavement with concrete and filler. Then painted it with black paint, 23rd April
item.description:
33 Sandford Sandford

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Sandford Street, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Tgere are several potgoles along Ellison Rd in Cheltenham. 1 very large pothole at the top with the junction with Dowty Road, 23rd April
item.description:
The entire road on Ellison Rd could use a resurface, I can only imagine it would be like driving on the moon!!! There is a large pothole near the top with the junction with Dowty Rd, its been there for sometime plus several others
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Ellison Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Under your ref. 8290956, I reported that there had been two 30 mph signs at this site, but one disappeared. You planned to set up a second sign to fix the issue. Last week, your workers removed the existing sign and replaced it with a new sign. So there is still only one sign and the issue has not been resolved. It seems as though there's been a communication problem., 23rd April
item.description:
Between no. 26 and no. 29, Harvey's Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harvey's Lane, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Trolley abandoned, 22nd April
item.description:
It's blocking most of the path, making it less accessible to the public. The road is not a safe alternative for the elderly and disabled.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Union Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole road is full of potholes he needs re surfacing, 22nd April

The whole road

item.title: Loose copings on wall, 22nd April
item.description:
Sorry not sure if this is the right section to report this. Copings loose and have been moved on wall outside Winstonion Park . Concerned might be used as missiles to damage cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham

item.title: Weeds etc around safety barrier adjacent to Brockworth footpath 57 on Ermin st, 22nd April
item.description:
Significant weed growth in pavement surface underneath safety barrier - this is unsightly and also narrowing available pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
